title: Minecolonies Refreshed
description: Provides colony huts, blocks, & items with a vanilla style feeling.
body:
![RocketNode Server Hosting - Code: WARP-PIPES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c53dc34674a57afb729c1b99f2575a33ac09e419_0.webp) **Link**: https://rocketnode.com/wenxin
**Code**: **WARP-PIPES 25% Off** ___ ![minecolonies_refreshed_banner](https://github.com/WenXin20/PokemobsRemodeled/assets/12000593/52eac0d1-43b2-474f-992e-2fc9b3e5d77d) # 📜Description📜 🔹Remodels and retextures all blocks & items from MineColonies to provide a more vanilla-style feel.

## 🚸Requirements🚸 🔸1.16 - 1.20.1: MineColonies is required.
🔸1.16 - 1.20.1: Structurize is required for MineColonies.
🔸1.18+ Only: Block UI, Domum Ornamentum, & Multi-Piston are also required for Minecolonies.
❗See the MineColonies changelog in file downloads for the correct versions to install.

## 🖼️Media🖼️ 🔹See the gallery tab above for more images. ![Townhall Hut](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/12000593/149440724-64d8827a-5bfa-4957-a1e4-f994b41f44bc.png) ___ **I've partnered with RocketNode Hosting!** **RocketNode** provides top-tier server hosting worldwide, allowing you to set up your server with just a few clicks! Their intuitive dashboard makes server management a breeze, and you can even schedule automatic restarts without needing any coding knowledge. Use the code **WARP-PIPES** to get **25%** off your **first** month on any of their gaming servers. Get started here: https://rocketnode.com/wenxin
